hero.title: Get Involved
hero.subtitle: There are many ways to stand with us — give your time, your skills, or your network.

volunteerSection.label: Volunteer
volunteerSection.title: Join Our Team of Volunteers
volunteerSection.subtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself and how you'd like to help — we'll be in touch.
volunteerSection.successMessage: Thank you! Your application has been received — we'll be in touch soon.
volunteerSection.errorMessage: Something went wrong sending your application. Please try again or email us directly.

donateSection.label: Give
donateSection.title: Prefer to Give Financially?
donateSection.subtitle: Your donation funds real programmes, right now.

partnershipSection.label: Partner With Us
partnershipSection.title: Organizations & Businesses
partnershipSection.subtitle: We collaborate with NGOs, businesses, and institutions who share our mission.
paragraphs: Partnering with BethGold Foundation means joining a network committed to measurable, lasting community impact. Whether through in-kind donations, co-funded programmes, or skilled-volunteer placements, we tailor every partnership to what your organization can offer and what our communities need.
We're proud to work alongside businesses and institutions that share our belief that ability lives in everyone — and we'd welcome the chance to explore what we could build together.
partnershipSection.successMessage: Thank you! We've received your inquiry and will be in touch soon.
partnershipSection.errorMessage: Something went wrong sending your inquiry. Please try again or email us directly.
